name: Angry Exchange
description: Escalating conflict with harsh words, then attempted repair

messages.content: Why didn't you help me when I needed you?
You always do this. You're never there for me.
I don't know why I even bother talking to you.
Look, I'm sorry. I didn't mean that.

expected_trajectory.valence: drops sharply to negative, slight recovery at end
expected_trajectory.trust: significant damage, minimal recovery despite apology
expected_trajectory.arousal: spikes during conflict, drops during silence
